name: 海岛奇妙物语/Island Uncanny Story
short_description: Plane crash forces landing on a strange island. You happily interact with five women. Who would still choose to return to civilization?
detailed_description: As a well-rounded university graduate, the player finds themselves in an unfamiliar environment with five women who need care. They are eager to explore the island, establish a home, and search for food. Along the way, they will encounter the island’s primitive tribes, and everything begins from there – finding the lost sister, unraveling the island’s story, building a ship to sail to new islands, and comforting each of the women. In the game, players will experience all the stories that unfold here.
